expectations.text: Uses the google-generativeai Python SDK (import google.generativeai)
Reads GEMINI_API_KEY from environment variable or ~/scripts/ecosystem.env
expectations.evidence: Checks os.environ first, falls back to ~/scripts/ecosystem.env

expectations.text: Uses an appropriate Gemini model (Flash for cost efficiency or Pro for accuracy)
expectations.evidence: gemini-1.5-flash with comment 'Flash for cost efficiency per skill'

expectations.text: Sends transactions in a structured prompt and parses the categorized response
expectations.evidence: Structured prompt with category list, parses response.text.strip()

expectations.text: Includes error handling for API rate limits or failures
expectations.evidence: Try/except with 429/quota check, wait and retry logic
